scenario.name: SIP_INVITE_from_OSP_with_EmergencyCallData_Call-Info_reference
scenario.send:
INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos Call-ID: [call_id] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=next-content Content-Length: [len]
--next-content Content-Type: application/xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <svc:EmergencyCallData.ServiceInfo xmlns:svc="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:EmergencyCallData:ServiceInfo"> <svc:DataProviderReference>ng911test@example.org</svc:DataProviderReference> <svc:ServiceEnvironment>Business</svc:ServiceEnvironment> <svc:ServiceType>VOIP</svc:ServiceType> <svc:ServiceMobility>Unknown</svc:ServiceMobility> </svc:EmergencyCallData.ServiceInfo>
--next-content Content-Type: application/xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <pi:EmergencyCallData.ProviderInfo xmlns:pi="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:EmergencyCallData:ProviderInfo"> <pi:DataProviderReference>ng911test@example.org</pi:DataProviderReference> <pi:DataProviderString>NG911 Test</pi:DataProviderString> <pi:TypeOfProvider>Client</pi:TypeOfProvider> <pi:ContactURI>tel:+12025551212</pi:ContactURI> <pi:Language>en</pi:Language> <pi:DataProviderContact xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:vcard-4.0"> <vcard> <fn><text>NG911 Test</text></fn> <n> <surname>NG911</surname> <given>Test</given> <additional/> <prefix/> </n> <gender><sex>M</sex></gender> <lang> <parameters><pref><integer>1</integer></pref> </parameters> <language-tag>en</language-tag> </lang> <lang> <parameters><pref><integer>2</integer></pref> </parameters> <language-tag>pl</language-tag> </lang> <lang> <parameters><pref><integer>3</integer></pref> </parameters> <language-tag>ua</language-tag> </lang> <tel> <parameters> <type> <text>work</text> <text>voice</text> </type> </parameters> <uri>tel:+12025551212100</uri> </tel> <tel> <parameters> <type> <text>home</text> <text>voice</text> </type> </parameters> <uri>tel:+12025551212</uri> </tel> <email> <parameters><type><text>work</text></type> </parameters> <text>ng911test@example.org</text> </email> </vcard> </pi:DataProviderContact> </pi:EmergencyCallData.ProviderInfo>
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
--next-content--

ACK urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
